recommendations.title: First Match
recommendations.overview: Hardened by years in foster care, a teenage girl from Brooklyn’s Brownsville neighborhood decides that wrestling boys is the only way back to her estranged father.

recommendations.title: Private Lesson
recommendations.overview: Posing as a private tutor, Azra secretly coaches students on achieving their goals in life and love — but not without a few bumps in the road.

recommendations.title: Old Men in New Cars: In China They Eat Dogs II
recommendations.overview: The last wish of the dying "Monk" is for his foster child, Harald, to find his real son, Ludvig. But the latter is currently in a Swedish prison cell...

recommendations.title: Bring Her Back
recommendations.overview: Following the death of their father, a brother and sister are sent to live with a foster mother, only to learn that she is hiding a terrifying secret.

recommendations.title: The Wasp
recommendations.overview: Heather bumps into Carla, having not spoken to her in years, and presents her with a very unexpected proposition that could change both of their lives forever.

recommendations.title: Running with the Devil
recommendations.overview: A leader of a drug cartel sends his two toughest henchmen to investigate why a shipment was botched.

recommendations.title: The Love Scam
recommendations.overview: Drowning in debt, two brothers concoct a plan to scam a wealthy heiress and save their home in Naples — but unexpected love soon complicates the scheme.

recommendations.title: Small Time Crooks
recommendations.overview: A loser of a crook and his wife strike it rich when a botched bank job's cover business becomes a spectacular success.

recommendations.title: Mickey Blue Eyes
recommendations.overview: An English auctioneer proposes to the daughter of a mafia kingpin, only to realize that certain "favors" would be asked of him.

recommendations.title: The Hustle
recommendations.overview: Two female scam artists, one low rent and the other high class, compete to swindle a naïve tech prodigy out of his fortune. A remake of the 1988 comedy "Dirty Rotten Scoundrels."
